code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if string.is_empty(trimmed)
    println("")
    Ok(())
  else
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    let n = parts.len()
    mut result = ""
    mut i = n - 1
    while i >= 0
      let word = match parts.get(i)
      when Some(w)
        w
      when None
        ""
      end
      if string.is_empty(result)
        result = word
      else
        result = "#{result} #{word}"
      end
      i = i - 1
    end
    println(result)
    Ok(())
  end
end
